creator: nathan@frodo.counted.com
text:
The stable-supfile example in /usr/share/examples/cvsup still talks only of
	RELENG_3 and RELENG_2_2 and it is set to RELENG_3 for default. I would guess
	it should be RELENG_4 for 4.0, no?

Fix: 

Change default to RELENG_4? :)
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just check the file ;)
